description: The ValueEqualityDriver component lets you drive a boolean to whether or not one value is equal to another.

fields.Reference: The value that ``TargetValue`` is being compared to.
fields.Target: The boolean that is driven to true if ``TargetValue`` is equal to ``Reference`` and false if it isn't.
fields.Invert: Whether to invert the result of ``TargetValue``
fields.UseApproximateComparison: Whether or not to use approximate comparison for types such as float, where values that seem identical can be very slightly different.

usage: Use to drive the target boolean with whether the target's value is equal to the reference value.
